overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a female character standing on an elevated balcony overlooking a futuristic urban intersection. The character holds a red cup and occasionally drinks while observing the traffic and cyberpunk architecture of Night City below. The scene features a distinctive orange skyscraper with '05' signage, glass high-rises, and busy multi-level highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking cyberpunk city intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at the glass railing holding a red cup, looking out at the city traffic and architecture

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with large white 05 signage and orange accents, iconic Night City landmark
cluster of modern glass and steel high-rise buildings with reflective surfaces
multi-level highway structure with vehicles moving on elevated roadway
large illuminated digital screen displaying pink and purple advertisements on building facade
tall palm tree visible against the skyline on the left side
transparent glass safety barrier along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character stands on an elevated walkway overlooking a bustling cyberpunk city intersection. The iconic orange 05 tower dominates the center background, surrounded by glass skyscrapers. Traffic flows continuously on the multi-level highway system below, while digital billboards glow on nearby buildings. The character holds a red cup and observes the urban landscape from the sheltered balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking cyberpunk city intersection

events.description: character raises the red cup to her mouth and takes a drink

agents.ego_description: taking a sip from the red cup while continuing to look out over the city, then lowering the cup and resuming observation

segments.scene_description: The character continues to stand on the elevated walkway, now taking a drink from her cup while maintaining her view of the Night City traffic below. The urban backdrop remains constant with vehicles flowing on the highways and the orange 05 tower visible in the distance. After drinking, she continues to observe the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective from an elevated balcony, focusing on a character observing the dense, neon-lit verticality of a futuristic urban intersection. It begins with the character standing still on a sheltered walkway, overlooking a multi-level highway system where traffic flows beneath the towering presence of an iconic orange 05 skyscraper. As she remains in place, the camera captures her taking a drink from a red cup while the surrounding glass high-rises and glowing digital billboards continue to pulse with city life. The scene then settles back into a quiet observation of the sprawling cyberpunk landscape, with the constant motion of the vehicles below contrasting against her stationary silhouette.
